name: planning
description: Five-skill pipeline that turns a vague idea into executed work and keeps debugging disciplined: brainstorming validates the design via question-driven exploration, planning-projects produces a staged plan with phase gates and Red-Green cycles, executing-plans drives the plan with stage-gate checks, dispatching-parallel-agents fans out independent tasks marked Parallel YES, and no-fafo-debugging enforces evidence-first root-cause analysis when plans hit failures. Skills hand off to each other and were designed as a unit.
